nodes.name: subtask_01_Place_the_Mug_on_the_CoffeeMachine
preconds: Mug is on the dining table
CoffeeMachine is on the dining table
Robot is not holding the mug
effects: Robot is not holding the mug

nodes.name: subtask_02_Place_the_Fork_and_Spoon_in_a_Drawer
preconds: Robot is not holding the fork or spoon.
Fork and spoon are on the dining table.
effects: Fork is placed in the drawer.
Spoon is placed in the drawer.

nodes.name: subtask_03_Place_the_Lettuce_and_Tomato_in_the_Fridge
preconds: Robot is not holding any object.
Lettuce and tomato are on the dining table.
effects: Robot is not holding any object.

edges.reason: Both subtasks place items in the fridge, which is a shared target receptacle.
